subcodes.first_line: Your letter of consolation regarding the supreme calamity of the passing of Abu'l-Fadá'il hath brought solace to hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعزيت‌نامه شما بر مصيبت کبری وفات ابی‌الفضائل سبب تسلّی قلوب گرديد
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @the concourse on high, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
